extraction.one_line_summary: DENZ Nico attacked from 4-rider break at 12km to go on Colle Brianza, absorbed chasers in final 3km, won solo sprint.
tactical_patterns: 30-rider breakaway fractured to 5 then 4 on penultimate climb; GC teams allowed 8+ minute gap without chase.
DENZ attacked 12km out on Colle Brianza despite being marked as fastest sprinter, forcing others to chase.
Break composition with 26 initially suggested teams prioritized stage hunting over GC positioning before mountain stages.

rider_signals.DENZ Nico: positive: Won from 4-rider break despite nearly being dropped on final climb, showing resilience under duress converted to attack.
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: negative: Abandoned race due to illness, significant sprint threat removed from competition.
rider_signals.BATISTELLO Samuel: negative: Dropped from initial break due to sickness, unable to sustain early effort.
rider_signals.COMRAD Patrick: negative: Lost several minutes in GC group, significant time leak for Bora-Hansgrohe backup plan.
